pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version that supports Java 21 compilation features.
Replace javax.inject with jakarta.inject-api to comply with Jakarta EE namespace requirements for modern JDKs.
Replace javax.annotation-api with jakarta.annotation-api to comply with Jakarta EE namespace requirements.
Upgrade SLF4J to version 2.x which is required for compatibility with modern logging implementations on Java 21.
Upgrade Logback to version 1.4.x to ensure compatibility with SLF4J 2.x and Java 21.
Upgrade JUnit to version 5.10.1 to ensure test compatibility with Java 21.
Upgrade Mockito to version 5.8.0 to ensure mocking capabilities work correctly on Java 21.
Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to version 3.2.5 to support running tests on Java 21.
Upgrade maven-failsafe-plugin to version 3.2.5 to support integration tests on Java 21.
Upgrade jacoco-maven-plugin to version 0.8.11 to support code coverage analysis for Java 21 bytecode.
Upgrade Jackson to version 2.16.1 to ensure JSON processing compatibility with Java 21.
Upgrade SnakeYAML to version 2.0 to ensure YAML parsing compatibility with Java 21.
Upgrade Google Auto Service to version 1.1.1 to ensure annotation processing compatibility with Java 21.
Upgrade JavaPoet to version 1.13.0 to ensure code generation compatibility with Java 21.
Upgrade maven-javadoc-plugin to version 3.6.3 to support generating documentation for Java 21 APIs.
Change the Maven groupId from the personal GitHub namespace to the official project namespace.
Rename the root artifact to 'dependencies' to better reflect its role as a BOM/parent POM.
Update the project version from alpha3-SNAPSHOT to 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT.
Refactor the module structure to group components into runtime, compile-time, bundles, and integrations.
Add JetBrains annotations dependency for nullability and other static analysis hints.
Add AssertJ as a test dependency for fluent assertions.
Add YAML Simple dependency for YAML configuration support.
Add flatten-maven-plugin to manage multi-module versioning during releases.
Add maven-source-plugin to attach source jars during the build.
Add maven-dependency-plugin for dependency management tasks.
Add findbugs-maven-plugin for static code analysis.
Add maven-pmd-plugin for static code analysis.
Add maven-gpg-plugin for signing artifacts during release.
Add maven-release-plugin to automate the release process.
Add maven-deploy-plugin for deploying artifacts to repositories.
Add nexus-staging-maven-plugin for managing releases to Sonatype Nexus.
Add central-publishing-maven-plugin for publishing to Maven Central.
Create a dedicated 'deploy' profile to activate signing and publishing plugins only during releases.
Remove explicit distribution management URLs in favor of plugin-based publishing.
Remove the hardcoded SCM tag to allow dynamic version tagging.

.gitignore.general_idea: Ignore the dependency-reduced-pom.xml file generated by the Maven Dependency Plugin to prevent committing build artifacts.
Add a recursive pattern to ignore all target directories in submodules or nested projects, ensuring cleaner repository state.

CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md.general_idea: Updated the project team contact email in the Code of Conduct from a university address to a personal domain address.

LICENSE.general_idea: Switched the project license from MIT to Apache License 2.0.
LICENSE.human_impl: Replaced MIT License text with Apache License 2.0 header and copyright notice.

README.md.general_idea: Update the CI badge URL to point to the correct GitHub Actions workflow.
Correct the relative path for the header image to use a dot-prefixed directory.
Update the documentation link to the new domain.
Rewrite the introductory text to better explain the framework's value proposition and history.
README.md.human_impl: This project started out as a proof of concept (originally named SimpleDI)...

README.md.general_idea: Update the generic class name in the code example from YourClass to MyClass for clarity.
Add a new section explaining how WireDI differs from other frameworks by emphasizing compile-time processing.
README.md.human_impl: ### Yeah, I have seen this before... So, how does this framework differ from other frameworks?

README.md.general_idea: Refine the explanation of the framework's hybrid compile-time/runtime nature.
README.md.human_impl: Yes and no. It does a lot of work at compile time, but as a state, not completely.

README.md.general_idea: Add a detailed Quick Start section with step-by-step installation instructions.
Update the Maven dependency groupId and artifactId to reflect the new project structure.
Update the parent POM coordinates to use the new groupId and artifactId.
Add a section linking to concrete examples of using the framework.

README.md.general_idea: Add a section documenting the order of property resolution.
Add a section describing the high-level project module structure.
README.md.human_impl: # Project Structure ... split into two modules: [runtime](runtime) and [compile time](compile-time).
